assets.caption: Format Foundry brings conversion, media, archive, metadata, storage, and download workflows into one Windows and Linux workspace.
A workflow-first desktop surface for conversion, compression, extraction, documents, images, audio, video, archives, and metadata.
The updater detects optional tools, explains the features each one enables, and routes setup through trusted package managers and official links.
The aria2 workspace keeps protocol support, queue state, pause and stop controls, progress, and risk guidance visible.
Versioned Windows installers, Debian packages, AppImages, checksums, and coordinated CI make the project usable beyond a source checkout.
The optional Idea Bank adds a searchable, local-only workspace for ideas, status, tags, notes, archiving, and CSV export.

assets.role: Gallery slide 6 - optional PC Health Snapshot
assets.caption: The optional PC Health Snapshot provides a private, read-only overview of the operating system, memory, disk space, and security-provider status.
Format Foundry: from scattered tools to one dependable workflow.
